_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Examine and identify database structural necessities by evaluating operations, applications, and programming.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of relational database management system concepts, including normalization theory, indexing strategies, transaction isolation levels, query execution plans, and performance optimization principles.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-K-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-T-001 (DA, cosine: 0.527), TF-T-007 (TF, cosine: 0.524).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.3/10 (raw 0.431). Shared vocabulary: [database]. DCWF-only terms [applications, evaluating, examine, identify, necessities, operations] vs WIDAI-only terms [concepts, execution, indexing, isolation, knowledge, levels] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.874 (P=0.880, R=0.869). Balanced P/R — the 12-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Examine and identify database structural necessities by evaluating operations, a" and "Knowledge of relational database management system concepts, including normaliza" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.569 > STS 0.431 (gap +0.139). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [database] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.5%. Shared tokens: [database]. DCWF-only: [applications, evaluating, examine, identify, necessities, operations]. WIDAI-only: [concepts, execution, indexing, isolation, knowledge, levels].

signals.detail: STS 0.431 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.139 suggests some vocabulary-driven inflation in candidate selection.
